title: carex polymascula
intro: Carex polymascula, also known as the False Ostrich Fern, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Carex polymascula include its ability to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. The plant can be prepared into herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and salves, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
